T. *T 10 57(W), faFfW 3-11-88 7 4 3 ( ? l ) , finrFf? 1 0 - 8 - 1 9 8 9 999(w), f^TRT 2 f i - r > 1 9 9 0 6 9 ( w ) , foTFtf 1 1 - 2 - 1 9 9 1 3 0 4 ( w ) , f^TNf 7-6-1991 4 4 4 ( W ) , fow 3 0 - 4 - 1 9 9 2 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Deptt. of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th September, 1994 G.S.R. 731(E).â€”Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the USP of certain anti-diarrhoeal preparations do not have therapeutic justification and are likely to involve risk to human beings and it is necessary and expedient 10 prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of these drugs in public interest. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 26A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (22 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following futhcr amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. G.S.R. 578(E), dated 23rd July, 1983 namely ;â€” In the table appended to the said notification after serial number 45 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and the entries shall be added namely :â€” 46. Antidiarrhoeal formulations containing Kaolin or Pectin or Attapul- gite or Activated Charcoal. 47. Antidiarrhoeal formulations containing Ph'halyl Sulphathiazole or Sulphagnanidine or Succinyl Sulphathiazole. 48. Antidiarrhoeal formulations containing Neomycin or Streptomycin or Dihydrostrcptomycin including their respective salts or esters. 49. Liquid Ond antidiarrhoeals or any other dosage form for paediatric use containing Diphenoxylate or Loperamide or Atropine or Bella- donna including their salts or esters or metabolites Hyoscyumino or their extracts or their alkaloids. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART.Hâ€” SEC. 3(1)] 50. Liquid oral antidiarrhocals or any other dosage form for paediatric use containing halogenatcd hydroxyquinolincs. 51. Fixed dose combination of antidiarrhocals with electrolyses. [No. X. 11014|9|94-DMS & PFA1 SHAILAJA CHANDRA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :â€”The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide GSR No. 578(E), dated 23-7-83 and subsequently amended by :â€” 1. GSR No. 49(E), dated 31-1-1984 2. GSR No. 322(E), dated 3-5-1984 3. GSR No. 865(E), dated 22-11-1985 4. GSR No. 700(E), dated 15-6-1988 5. GSR No. 1057(E), dated 3-11-1988 6. GSR No, 743(E), dated 10-8-1989 7. GSR No. 999(E), dated 26-12-1990 8. GSR No. 69(E), dated 11-2-1991 9. GSR No. 304(E), dated 7-6-1991 10.
